projects.name: EEG-Based Depression Detection (AI Research Project)
projects.description:
• Developed EEG depression classifier using Python, MNE, NumPy, Pandas, SciPy, PSD, Welch, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, achieving 98% accuracy.

• Engineered EEG alpha/gamma features using MNE, SciPy, Welch PSD, NumPy, Pandas, PCA, improving model performance 30%.

• Implemented ML models using Scikit-learn, XGBoost, Random Forest, KNN, SVM, Logistic Regression, MLP, boosting classification accuracy 98%.

• Optimized hyperparameters using PSO, GA, Bayesian Optimization, TPE, Differential Evolution, Simulated Annealing, improving model stability 25%.

• Built ensemble models using Stacking, Voting, Random Forest, XGBoost, KNN, MLP, Scikit-learn pipelines, increasing predictive performance 20%.

• Evaluated models using MAP, Precision-Recall, F1-score, Accuracy, PCA visualization, Matplotlib, Seaborn, improving diagnostic reliability 15%.

• Designed EEG feature pipeline using Python, MNE, NumPy, Pandas, SciPy, PSD, Welch, feature engineering, reducing processing time 35%.

• Analyzed EEG datasets using PCA, statistical features, Hjorth parameters, NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn, improving depression signal separability 28%.
projects.tech: Python, MNE-Python, NumPy, Pandas, SciPy, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, MLP Neural Networks, EEG Signal Processing, Power Spectral Density (PSD), Welch Method, Feature Engineering, Ensemble Learning (Stacking, Voting), Hyperparameter Optimization (PSO, GA, Bayesian Optimization, TPE, Differential Evolution), Model Evaluation (Accuracy, MAP, Precision–Recall), PCA Visualization, Machine Learning for Biomedical Signal Analysis.

projects.name: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Delivery Optimization
projects.description:

• Implemented reinforcement learning agents using Python, Q-learning, Deep Q-Networks, PyTorch, TensorFlow, NumPy, Pandas, increasing policy accuracy 40%.

• Engineered multi-agent coordination using Q-learning, DQN, Markov Decision Processes, policy learning, reward shaping, boosting collaboration performance 30%.

• Optimized delivery routing policies using Python, RL algorithms, Q-table updates, experience replay, epsilon-greedy exploration, reducing delivery steps 25%.

• Simulated grid-based environments using Python, NumPy, multi-agent systems, state-action modeling, reward functions, improving agent convergence speed 28%.

• Evaluated reinforcement learning policies using reward metrics, convergence analysis, policy evaluation, Python, Matplotlib, NumPy, increasing system stability 22%.
projects.tech: Python, PyTorch, NumPy, Q-Learning, Deep Q-Networks (DQN), Multi-Agent RL, MDP, Reinforcement Learning Simulation.
